mapper.select: select id, username, password_hash, role, status, display_name, must_change_password, last_login_at, created_at from users where username = #{username}
select id, username, password_hash, role, status, display_name, must_change_password, last_login_at, created_at from users where id = #{id}
select id, username, role, status, display_name, must_change_password, last_login_at, created_at from users order by id
mapper.insert: insert into users(username, password_hash, role, status, display_name, must_change_password, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{status}, #{displayName}, #{mustChangePassword}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update users set role = #{role}, status = #{status}, display_name = #{displayName}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update users set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, must_change_password = #{mustChangePassword}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update users set last_login_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from users where role = 'ADMIN'
select count(1) from users where role = 'ADMIN' and status = 'ACTIVE' and id <> #{id}
